goal: Replace hourly Telegram monitoring report with canonical, readable, operator-approved template and verify full autonomous contour.
problem_evidence: Telegram hourly messages are short non-canonical lines such as BEM-41/BEM-48 pass candidates and do not show stage, roadmap, checklist, table, provider route, or blockers.
required_chain: Auditor Claude primary or explicit fallback
Executor Claude primary or explicit fallback
acceptance_criteria: Template follows canon: BEM header, stage/roadmap %, checklist, readable table, provider route, blockers, next action.
Routine hourly report uses this template.
Operator approval is requested through structured decision package.
Provider gate records whether Claude Code primary or GPT reserve was used.
Final report states how every element worked.
